positive: A symmetrical, vibrant celestial journey scene, featuring a stylized mythical griffin soaring over crystalline floating islands and bioluminescent cosmic flora. The griffin should have elegant, powerful lines and intricate feather detailing. The composition must be centered, with the griffin placed in a dominant, dynamic pose against a deep indigo and teal gradient background speckled with golden nebula dust. Use a clean silhouette style with high contrast, ensuring the edges are crisp and defined for apparel printing. Lighting should be ethereal and dramatic, suggesting dawn breaking on a distant planet. Vector illustration quality, high detail, intricate linework, cosmic vaporwave aesthetic.
